hero.headline: Product-grade mobile systems for realtime moments at global scale.
hero.subhead: I craft resilient iOS experiences where live state correctness and product feel coexist. My recent work ships to millions of sports fans under peak-demand conditions.
hero.panelNote: Reliability, release ownership, and architecture that remains graceful under pressure.

sections.workHeading: Projects that shaped my engineering journey.

sections.experienceHeading: A showcase of the products, technical challenges, and engineering decisions that define my experience as a Senior Mobile Engineer.
sections.photographyHeading: Quiet moments away from release cycles and incident dashboards.

consentModal.title: We value your privacy
consentModal.description: This site uses privacy-friendly, cookieless analytics by default. With your consent, it also uses Mixpanel, which stores data on your device, to understand how the site is used. You can accept, reject, or manage your choice at any time.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary
necessary.description: Required for the site to work. These are always on and cannot be turned off.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Mixpanel helps us understand how visitors use the site so it can be improved. Enabled only with your consent.
